attributes.action: Call a General Election in light of recent local election results.
attributes.additional_details: The last time this petition was launched, the petitions authority threw it out saying it had been debated already. However, following on from the local elections in May 2026, it is apparent from the landslide victories of other parties, that the electorate have had enough and no longer have faith in the Labour party as a collective.
attributes.background: Listen to the voice of the electorate and give the people what they want in the form of a general election.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
